description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a distinctive, patterned design on the ear cups. The ear cups are circular and feature a concentric, woven or knitted pattern in shades of red, gray, black, and white, giving them a unique, handcrafted appearance. The headband is a solid, dark blue color and appears to be made of a flexible material, connecting the two ear cups. The ear pads themselves are thick and cushioned, likely providing comfort for extended wear. There are no visible wires, buttons, or branding, suggesting a minimalist and possibly wireless design. The overall construction appears lightweight and portable, suitable for personal audio use in urban environments.
description: A pair of over-ear headphones with patterned, cushioned ear cups and a dark blue headband, featuring a unique concentric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both patterned ear cups and the arching blue headband.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular, concentric pattern on one ear cup and the thickness of the padding.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with both ear cups and the headband visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the detailed pattern and ear cup depth.
